description: DTC product page with hero, features, testimonials, comparison table, doctor endorsement, how-to steps, reviews, guarantee, FAQ

page_title.description: SEO page title with product name and main benefit

meta_description.description: SEO meta description, 150-160 chars, includes product name, main benefit, and call to action
meta_description.example: EMSense is a powerful massager that helps relieve foot pain, tingling, burning sensations, and numbness.

sale_discount_text.description: Discount percentage displayed in sale banner

hero_headline.description: Bold hero headline, emotional pattern interrupt with product category and main benefit
hero_headline.example: Finally! Real Relief for Neuropathy Pain in Your Feet

hero_subtitle.description: Hero subtitle, 1-2 sentences explaining what the product does in simple terms
hero_subtitle.example: Uses Triple Technology to help relieve pain, tingling, swelling, and foot fatigue without costly procedures or addictive medications.

hero_benefit_1_title.description: First hero benefit title, short punchy benefit (e.g. therapy type)

hero_benefit_1_desc.description: First hero benefit description, what it does for the user
hero_benefit_1_desc.example: helps dilate blood vessels to support healthy circulation.*

hero_benefit_3_desc.example: steadies the feet and directs blood flow where it's needed most.*

hero_trust_1_title.description: Trust badge 1 title in hero section, short 2-4 words

hero_trust_1_desc.description: Trust badge 1 description, reinforces confidence with product name
hero_trust_1_desc.example: We're so confident [Product] will help you, we're giving you 30 full days to try it out.

hero_trust_2_desc.example: Order today and we will handle and send your package completely free of charge!

hero_trust_3_desc.example: Made from durable, high quality materials, this product is created to last for years.

hiw_heading.description: How-it-works section heading, frames the product as single solution
hiw_heading.example: One Device That Does It All - Here's How:

hiw_card_1_title.description: HIW card 1 title, short benefit 2-5 words

hiw_card_1_desc.example: Targeted red light wavelengths penetrate the surface of the skin, promoting more efficient blood flow.*

hiw_card_2_title.description: HIW card 2 title, short benefit 2-5 words

hiw_card_2_desc.description: HIW card 2 description, different mechanism than card 1
hiw_card_2_desc.example: Different massage intensity levels help relieve pain and tingling in the affected area.*

hiw_card_3_desc.description: HIW card 3 description, about reducing swelling/healing
hiw_card_3_desc.example: Helps reduce swelling and supports the healing of damaged nerves.*

hiw_card_4_title.description: HIW card 4 title, about ease of use, 2-5 words

hiw_card_4_desc.description: HIW card 4 description, simplicity and no side effects
hiw_card_4_desc.example: No side effects, no complicated routines. Just use it while you relax and let symptoms fade.

review_count.description: Total review count displayed in hero and reviews section

problem_headline.description: Problem section heading, names the specific pain/problem the user has
problem_headline.example: The Real Cause of Foot Pain & Aches

problem_description.description: 3-5 sentences explaining the root cause vividly, uses <strong class=""> for key terms, ends with hopeful transition
problem_description.example: Your nerves need oxygen to function properly... But when blood flow slows down, those cells don't get what they need... But don't worry...
problem_description.format:
HTML with tags and

paragraphs

problem_stat_1_desc.description: Problem stat 1 description text, short, ends with asterisk
problem_stat_1_desc.example: people aged 40+ report occasional foot pain*

problem_stat_2_desc.description: Problem stat 2 description text, short, ends with asterisk
problem_stat_2_desc.example: say their everyday life is affected due to foot pain.*

problem_stat_3_desc.description: Problem stat 3 description text, short, ends with asterisk
problem_stat_3_desc.example: rely on painkillers to reduce foot pain.*

problem_stat_4_desc.description: Problem stat 4 description text, short, ends with asterisk
problem_stat_4_desc.example: noticed negative mood changes due to constant pain.*

product_headline.description: Main product section heading, aspirational outcome
product_headline.example: You Are One Step Closer to Getting Rid of Foot Pain Once and For All*

feature_1_heading.description: First product feature heading, introduces the product name and main technology
feature_1_heading.example: Meet the EMSense Triple Therapy Foot Massager

feature_1_description.description: Detailed explanation of how the product works, list numbered therapies with bold benefits. Use <strong class=""> for emphasis.
feature_1_description.example: We've spent years developing this device to address pain at its source: reduced blood oxygen supply. We call it The Triple Therapy because: 1. Red Light Heating... 2. Massage... 3. Compression...
feature_1_description.format:
HTML with tags and

paragraphs

feature_2_heading.description: Second feature heading, lists conditions the product helps with

feature_2_description.description: Intro text before the conditions list
feature_2_description.example: Here's a full list of conditions the massager can help with:

feature_3_heading.description: Third feature heading, about expert creation/endorsement

feature_3_description.description: Description of who created the product and cost advantage vs alternatives. Use <strong class=""> for emphasis.
feature_3_description.example: Getting an appointment with a podiatrist isn't always easy... That's why a team of specialists came up with this at-home device... It costs less than one visit to a podiatrist.

feature_4_heading.description: Fourth feature heading, about ease of use

feature_4_description.description: How easy it is to use the product, step-by-step in one paragraph. Use <strong class=""> for key actions.
feature_4_description.example: Uses clinically backed methods - red light therapy, massage, and compression... Just slip it on, press a button, choose intensity...

testimonials_headline.description: Testimonials section heading, social proof driven
testimonials_headline.example: Our Customers Report Significantly Reduced Pain Levels:

testimonial_1_text.description: First testimonial text, conversational tone, specific outcome mentioned
testimonial_1_text.example: I been dealing with nerve pain for a while now and honestly didn't think anything would help. But this product? Wow! I use it every night now and my feet feel so much better.

testimonial_2_text.description: Second testimonial text, different persona (e.g. physically active worker)
testimonial_2_text.example: I work on my feet all day and by the time I get home, they're dead. This massager really surprised me.

testimonial_3_text.description: Third testimonial text, different angle (e.g. doctor recommended, skeptic converted)
testimonial_3_text.example: I got this cuz my doctor said it might help. I been using it couple weeks now and I think it's working.

success_rate_pct.description: Success rate percentage for the highlighted stat

success_rate_title.example: Improving Blood Circulation In Your Feet*

success_rate_description.description: Brief description of the success rate stat
success_rate_description.example: 84% of customers were satisfied and found it effective.*

comparison_headline.description: Comparison section heading, frames the choice (our product vs conventional)
comparison_headline.example: Ditch Expensive Treatments and Pills, Choose Safer Alternative*

comparison_subtitle.description: Comparison section subtitle, one-sentence benefit statement
comparison_subtitle.example: It's non-addictive, works fast, and actually does GOOD things for your body.

our_product_title.description: Our product name in the comparison table

our_benefit_4.example: Supports long-term health, not just temporary fixes*

our_benefit_6.example: Safe for daily use - no side effects*

our_benefit_7.example: Easy to use at home, anytime you need it

their_product_title.description: Competitor/conventional methods title in comparison table

their_negative_1.example: Depend on medications that may cause side effects*

their_negative_2.example: Can take hours (or longer) to kick in*

their_negative_3.example: Not always trusted by medical professionals*

their_negative_4.example: Offer short-term relief with repeated use*

their_negative_5.example: Risk of long-term harm with frequent use*

results_subtitle.description: Results intro text, frames the timeline for expected results
results_subtitle.example: Here's what this powerful technology can help you achieve in just 90 days.*

result_stat_3_desc.example: can now walk longer distances without discomfort*

doctor_name.description: Doctor/expert full name and title (Dr. prefix)

doctor_specialty.description: Doctor's specialty, must match the product category

doctor_quote.description: Doctor endorsement quote, 3-4 sentences. First establishes expertise, then names the solution, then recommends. Use <strong class=""> for key claims.
doctor_quote.example: I've spent the last 8 years helping patients manage chronic foot pain... The truth is - effective, non-invasive solutions do exist... That's why I recommend this product.
doctor_quote.format:
HTML with tags and

paragraphs

howto_headline.description: How-to section heading, ease of use signal

howto_subtitle.example: Simply select the settings and enjoy relief!

step_1_desc.example: Slide your feet into the massager and fasten the adjustable straps for a comfortable fit.

step_2_desc.example: Select your preferred massage intensity, heat level, and timer using the simple control panel.

step_3_desc.description: Step 3 description, what the user feels during use, sensory and reassuring
step_3_desc.example: That's it! In just minutes, you'll feel soothing warmth and gentle relief working together to reduce discomfort.*

reviews_subtitle.example: See What Others Are Saying About Our Product

review_1_title.example: "Working great for both my elbows and ankles"

review_1_text.description: Review 1 full text, specific details about results
review_1_text.example: Working great for both my elbows and my ankles to increase blood flow and relief for arthritis soreness.

review_2_text.description: Review 2 full text, emotional impact story
review_2_text.example: They have eased the numbness in my feet and legs... It's helping where nothing else has.

review_3_title.example: "I can wake up not drugged by opiates"

review_3_text.description: Review 3 full text, powerful before/after story
review_3_text.example: The shooting pains are not so frequent which gives me a better nights sleep.

guarantee_subtitle.example: We put our money where our mouth is.

guarantee_description.example: If you're unhappy, you're eligible for a 100% refund within 30 days.

faq_headline.example: Read Our Customers' Frequently Asked Questions

faq_q1.example: How often should I use this product?

faq_a1.example: For best results, we recommend using it daily for 15-30 minutes.

faq_q2.example: Is it safe for people with [specific condition]?

faq_a2.example: Yes! It was designed with conditions like [X] in mind. Consult your healthcare provider if unsure.

faq_a3.example: It is made with an adjustable design that comfortably fits most sizes.

faq_q4.example: Can I use it while [specific activity]?

faq_a4.example: It is intended for use while sitting or reclining for safety and effectiveness.

faq_q5.description: FAQ question 5, about timeline for results
faq_q5.example: How long does it take to feel relief?

faq_a5.example: Many users report noticeable relief after just one session.

cta_text.description: Main CTA button text, repeated 8 times throughout the page. Imperative, urgent, specific.

sticky_cta_text.description: Sticky banner CTA text, shorter version

stock_urgency_text.example: if you order now. Better hurry -- stock is running out!

disclaimer_text.description: Legal disclaimer in footer, results vary, not medical advice, consult doctor
disclaimer_text.example: Results may vary from person to person. [Product Name] is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any medical condition. Consult your healthcare provider before use.
